generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion for gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series swing angle measurements from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls horizontal movement of the cart along the crane frame"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vertical hoisting of the electromagnet"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up and releases containers (pucks) during operations"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural framework supporting the gantry crane system"
]

instance TMC4671EvalController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor controller for precise stepper motor operation"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Provides stable power to all physical components"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, DataLoggingService, ValidationService, VisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, VisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, DataLoggingService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for creating 3D models of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360CADModel
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SystemArchitectureModel
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control and repository hosting for digital twin code"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, DataLoggingService, ValidationService, VisualizationService
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of the gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for calculating optimal trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics and motion prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance SystemArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System architecture model created using Capella for MBSE"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for predictive analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulation results for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultNotificationAction
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes real-time system status via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStatusInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory for movement planning"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation results for system behavior"
]

instance FaultNotificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends fault notifications via dashboard when validation thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for trend analysis and decision-making"
]

instance RealTimeStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system status for operational decisions"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for moving containers between locations"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, TMC4671EvalController, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, PowerSupplyUnit, Arduino
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single centralized digital twin with interconnected services"
    base:contains TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ValidationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker, TimescaleDB, Docker, Grafana, PythonGantrylib, Capella, GitHub
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are sent via the Physical Crane Interface to the motor controllers and electromagnet, enabling movement and container handling."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation services, with no specific time intervals specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical crane components interact with Python services (gantrylib), Dockerized database (TimescaleDB), MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto), and Grafana dashboard; all deployed on a single personal computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed phase (CAD models in Fusion360, Capella-based Model-Based Systems Engineering) and as-operated phase (real-time data logging, validation during operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time trajectory measurements with simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics against predefined thresholds to ensure model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; physical interface uses unspecified protocols for controller communication, with Arduino handling sensor data acquisition."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; Python module gantrylib for other services installed via pip."
]
